debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
hn : 1 < n
⊢ ↑n.factorial > chapter2.e * (↑n / chapter2.e) ^ n

failed_attempts: simpa [e] using (Real.mul_rpow_lt_factorial (show (1 : ℝ) < (n : ℝ) by exact_mod_cast hn))

simpa [e] using (Real.mul_rpow_le_factorial (n := n) hn).lt_of_ne' (by
    intro h
    have : (0 : ℝ) < exp (1 : ℝ) := by simpa using (Real.exp_pos (1 : ℝ))
    have hn' : (0 : ℝ) < n := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.pos_of_gt (lt_trans (by norm_num1) hn))
    have : (0 : ℝ) < (n : ℝ) / exp (1 : ℝ) := div_pos hn' this
    have : (0 : ℝ) < (n : ℝ) / exp (1 : ℝ) ^ n := by
      simpa [div_eq_mul_inv] using
        mul_pos hn' (inv_pos.2 (pow_pos (by simpa using this) n))
    have : (0 : ℝ) < (n : ℝ).factorial := by
      exact_mod_cast (Nat.factorial_pos n)
    exact (ne_of_gt (mul_pos (mul_pos this (pow_pos (by simpa using div_pos hn' (Real.exp_pos (1 : ℝ))) n))
      this)).symm h)
simpa [e] using Real.mul_rpow_div_le_factorial (n := n) (by exact_mod_cast hn.le)

have hn0 : (0 : ℝ) < n := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.pos_of_lt (lt_trans (by norm_num1) hn))
  have he0 : (0 : ℝ) < e := by
    dsimp [e]
    simpa using (exp_pos (1 : ℝ))
  have hne : (0 : ℝ) < (n : ℝ) / e := div_pos hn0 he0
  have hpow_pos : (0 : ℝ) < ((n : ℝ) / e) ^ n := by
    simpa [pow_eq_zero_of_le_zero] using (pow_pos hne n)
  have hmul_pos : (0 : ℝ) < e * ((n : ℝ) / e) ^ n := mul_pos he0 hpow_pos
  have hfact_pos : (0 : ℝ) < (n.factorial : ℝ) := by
    exact_mod_cast (Nat.factorial_pos n)
  have : (e * ((n : ℝ) / e) ^ n) / (n.factorial : ℝ) < 1 := by
    have : 0 < (e * ((n : ℝ) / e) ^ n) / (n.factorial : ℝ) := div_pos hmul_pos hfact_pos
    exact lt_of_le_of_ne this.le (by simpa using this.ne')
  have : e * ((n : ℝ) / e) ^ n < (n.factorial : ℝ) := by
    have hfne : (n.factorial : ℝ) ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hfact_pos
    simpa [div_lt_one hfne] using this
  exact this
simpa [e] using (Real.factorial_lt_exp_mul_pow_div (by exact_mod_cast hn) : exp 1 * ((n : ℝ) / exp 1) ^ n < (n.factorial : ℝ))

have : (n.factorial : ℝ) > e * ((n : ℝ) / e) ^ n := by
    simpa [e] using Real.factorial_lt_exp_mul_pow_div (n := n) hn
  exact_mod_cast this

simpa [e] using (Nat.mul_div_pow_factorial_lt_exp n).trans_le' (by
    have : (0 : ℝ) ≤ exp (1 : ℝ) := le_of_lt (exp_pos 1)
    gcongr
    · exact le_of_lt (exp_pos 1)
    · exact le_of_lt (exp_pos 1))

have : (chapter2.e : ℝ) * ((n : ℝ) / chapter2.e) ^ n < (n : ℝ) ^ n := by
    have he : (0 : ℝ) < chapter2.e := by
      dsimp [chapter2.e]
      simpa using (Real.exp_pos (1 : ℝ))
    have hle : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (1 / chapter2.e) := (one_div_nonneg.mpr he.le)
    have hlt : (1 / chapter2.e) < 1 := by
      have : (1 : ℝ) < chapter2.e := by
        dsimp [chapter2.e]
        simpa using Real.one_lt_exp_iff.mpr (by norm_num1 : (0 : ℝ) < 1)
      simpa [one_div] using (inv_lt_one this)
    have hn0 : (0 : ℝ) < (n : ℝ) := by
      exact_mod_cast (lt_trans (by norm_num1) hn)
    have hn1 : (1 : ℝ) < (n : ℝ) := by
      exact_mod_cast hn
    have hnnz : (n : ℝ) ≠ 0 := hn0.ne'
    have : (chapter2.e * ((n : ℝ) / chapter2.e) ^ n) = (n : ℝ) ^ n * (1 / chapter2.e) ^ (n - 1) := by
      have hnpos : 0 < n := Nat.succ_le_iff.mp hn
      have hn1' : 1 ≤ n := Nat.succ_le_iff.mp hnpos
      calc
        chapter2.e * ((n : ℝ) / chapter2.e) ^ n
            = chapter2.e * ((n : ℝ) * (1 / chapter2.e)) ^ n := by
                simp [div_eq_mul_inv, one_div]
        _ = chapter2.e * ((n : ℝ) ^ n * (1 / chapter2.e) ^ n) := by
              simp [mul_pow]
        _ = (n : ℝ) ^ n * (chapter2.e * (1 / chapter2.e) ^ n) := by
              ring
        _ = (n : ℝ) ^ n * ((1 / chapter2.e) ^ (n - 1)) := by
              have : (chapter2.e * (1 / chapter2.e) ^ n) = (1 / chapter2.e) ^ (n - 1) := by
                have hn' : n = (n - 1) + 1 := (Nat.sub_add_cancel hn1').symm
                simp [hn', pow_add, mul_assoc, he.ne', one_div]
              simpa [this]
    rw [this]
    have hpow : (1 / chapter2.e) ^ (n - 1) < 1 := by
      have hpos' : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (1 / chapter2.e) ^ (n - 1) := by
        exact pow_nonneg hle _
      have : (1 / chapter2.e) ^ (n - 1) ≤ (1 / chapter2.e) := by
        rcases Nat.eq_zero_or_pos (n - 1) with h0 | hpos
        · simp [h0, hlt.le]
        · exact pow_le_self_of_le_one hle hlt.le (Nat.succ_le_iff.mp hpos)
      exact lt_of_le_of_lt this hlt
    have hnPowPos : (0 : ℝ) < (n : ℝ) ^ n := by
      simpa using pow_pos hn0 n
    have := mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left hpow hnPowPos
    simpa [mul_one] using this
  have hfac : (n : ℝ) ^ n ≤ (n.factorial : ℝ) := by
    have hn0 : 0 < n := Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (lt_trans (by norm_num1) hn)
    simpa using (Nat.cast_le.mpr (Nat.pow_le_factorial_pow_self n))
  exact lt_of_lt_of_le this hfac

classical
  have hn0 : (n : ℝ) ≠ 0 := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.ne_of_gt (Nat.succ_lt_iff.mp hn))
  have hn1 : (n : ℝ) ≠ 1 := by
    have : (n : ℕ) ≠ 1 := ne_of_gt hn
    exact_mod_cast this
  have hpos : 0 < (n : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.pos_of_gt (lt_trans (by norm_num1) hn))
  have hepos : (0 : ℝ) < e := by
    dsimp [e]
    simpa using (Real.exp_pos (1 : ℝ))
  have hge : (e : ℝ) ≤ n := by
    have : (e : ℝ) < 4 := by
      dsimp [e]
      have : Real.exp (1 : ℝ) < Real.exp (Real.log 4) :=
        Real.exp_lt_exp.mpr (by
          have : (1 : ℝ) < Real.log 4 := by
            have h' : Real.exp (1 : ℝ) < (4 : ℝ) := by norm_num
            simpa [Real.exp_log (by norm_num1)] using (Real.log_lt_iff_lt_exp.mp h')
          simpa using this)
      simpa [Real.exp_log (by norm_num1)] using this
    have hn4 : (4 : ℝ) ≤ n := by exact_mod_cast (le_trans (by norm_num1) (Nat.succ_le_iff.mp hn))
    exact this.le.trans hn4
  have hn_over_e_ge_one : (1 : ℝ) ≤ (n : ℝ) / e := by
    have : e ≤ (n : ℝ) := hge
    exact (one_le_div hepos).2 this
  have hpow_pos : (0 : ℝ) < ((n : ℝ) / e) ^ n := by
    exact pow_pos (div_pos hpos hepos) _
  have hmul_lt : e * ((n : ℝ) / e) ^ n < (n : ℝ) * ((n : ℝ) / e) ^ n := by
    exact (mul_lt_mul_right hpow_pos).2 (lt_of_lt_of_le (by
      have : (e : ℝ) < n := lt_of_lt_of_le (lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_lt (lt_of_lt_of_le (by
        have : (e : ℝ) < 4 := by
          dsimp [e]
          have : Real.exp (1 : ℝ) < (4 : ℝ) := by norm_num
          simpa using this
        exact this) (by
          exact_mod_cast (le_trans (by norm_num1) (Nat.succ_le_iff.mp hn)))) (Ne.symm hn0)) hge
      exact this) hge)
  have hfac_ge : (n : ℝ) * ((n : ℝ) / e) ^ n ≤ (n.factorial : ℝ) := by
    have : (n : ℝ) ≤ (n.factorial : ℝ) := by
      simpa using (Nat.cast_le.2 (Nat.le_factorial n))
    exact (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right this (le_of_lt hpow_pos))
  have : e * ((n : ℝ) / e) ^ n < (n.factorial : ℝ) := lt_of_lt_of_le hmul_lt hfac_ge
  exact this

simpa [e, mul_comm, mul_left_comm, mul_assoc, div_eq_mul_inv] using
    (Nat.factorial_pos n)

simpa [e] using (Real.mul_rpow_div_le_factorial (n := n) (by exact_mod_cast hn)).trans_lt
    (lt_of_lt_of_le (by
      have : (0 : ℝ) < Real.exp 1 := by simpa using (Real.exp_pos 1)
      nlinarith) le_rfl)

simpa [e, div_eq_mul_inv, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using
    (Nat.factorial_lt_exp_pow_mul_pow_div hn).lt
